{% if audience == "internal" %}
## NYT::NFlow::NBigRTExtensions::TDynamicProfileManagerSpec {#NYT_NFlow_NBigRTExtensions_TDynamicProfileManagerSpec}
<!-- This file is generated by yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/generate.sh script -->
<!-- Before using doc generation tool check readme: yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/README.md -->
Source: [yt/yt/flow/yandex/extensions/bigrt/cpp/serializable_profile/state_manager/spec.h]({{source-root}}/yt/yt/flow/yandex/extensions/bigrt/cpp/serializable_profile/state_manager/spec.h)

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `codec` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `TString("")`
Option to select the compression codec for base columns and the delta encoding algorithm. The default is good enough (zstd6 + vcdiff). It is not recommended to change this option without consulting the BigRT/Flow developers. ||
|| `recode_probability` | **Type**: `double`
**Default value**: `1.0`
Option to limit profile recoding speed, used only when changing the codec or delta encoding algorithm. ||
|| `reset_malformed_state` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `false`
Sometimes code has memory overruns and other bugs that can corrupt arbitrary data in the program. As a result, states may become corrupted and written incorrectly to {{product-name}}. Loading corrupted states will throw an exception and stop processing. This option lets you treat corrupted states as empty and continue processing. It is essentially an emergency option that should not be used in normal mode. ||
|| `discard_unknown_fields` | **Type**: `bool`
**Default value**: `false`
Enables discarding unknown protobuf fields. ||
|| `row_load_options` | **Type**: `NYT::NFlow::NBigRTExtensions::TRowLoadOptionsSpec`
**Default value**: `{'column_filter': [], 'enable_partial_result': false, 'enable_versioned_lookup_logging': true, 'keep_missing_rows': true, 'replica_consistency': 'sync', 'sync_last_committed': true, 'timeout': 60000, 'use_versioned_lookup': false}`
 ||
|| `row_write_options` | **Type**: `NYT::NFlow::NBigRTExtensions::TRowWriteOptionsSpec`
**Default value**: `{'enable_modifications_logging': false, 'enable_shared_write': false}`
 ||
|| `enable_corruption_diagnostics` | **Type**: `std::optional<bool>`
A single switch that enables logging to help diagnose state corruption. If set, its value overrides `row_load_options.enable_versioned_lookup_logging` and `row_write_options.enable_modifications_logging`. If `true`, it additionally forces `row_load_options.use_versioned_lookup` (versioned lookup logging works only with versioned lookup). If not set, the values of the separately configured options apply. All diagnostic messages are written to a separate logger `BigRTSerializableProfileCorruptionDiagnostic`. ||
|#
